result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 11:          EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) ...
                                                   ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), valid_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.case_id = c.id
  WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS cases_handled,
       AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM valid_cases
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), valid_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.case_id = c.id
  WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS cases_handled,
       AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM valid_cases
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), valid_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.case_id = c.id
  WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND c.closeddate <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS cases_handled,
       AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM valid_cases
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), valid_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,

  JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.case_id = c.id
  WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp

WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), valid_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.case_id = c.id
  WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL

    AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+', '') AS case_id_norm, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+', '')
), valid_cases AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from c.id), '^#+', '') AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS createddate,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.case_id_norm = regexp_replace(trim(both from c.id), '^#+', '')
  WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id
FROM valid_cases
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY AVG(handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+', '') AS case_id_norm, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+', '')
), valid_cases AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from c.id), '^#+', '') AS case_id,
         c.ownerid AS owner_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS createddate,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closeddate,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.case_id_norm = regexp_replace(trim(both from c.id), '^#+', '')
  WHERE oc.owner_assignments = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id
FROM valid_cases
GROUP BY owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY AVG(handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate, COUNT(ch.*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment') AS owner_assignment_count
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
ORDER BY c.closeddate DESC
LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate, COUNT(ch.*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment') AS owner_assignment_count
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
GROUP BY c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
ORDER BY c.closeddate DESC
LIMIT 50;

args.query:
SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, field__c, createddate
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
ORDER BY createddate DESC
LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, field__c, createddate
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
ORDER BY createddate DESC
LIMIT 50;

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
 SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+','') as case_id, COUNT(*) as owner_assignments
 FROM casehistory__c
 WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment'
 GROUP BY regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+','')
)
SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from c.ownerid), '^#+','') as agent_id,
 COUNT(*) as cases_handled,
 AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) as avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN owner_counts oc ON regexp_replace(trim(both from c.id), '^#+','') = oc.case_id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
 AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
 AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
 AND oc.owner_assignments = 1
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_counts AS (
 SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+','') as case_id, COUNT(*) as owner_assignments
 FROM casehistory__c
 WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment'
 GROUP BY regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+','')
)
SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from c.ownerid), '^#+','') as agent_id,
 COUNT(*) as cases_handled,
 AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) as avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN owner_counts oc ON regexp_replace(trim(both from c.id), '^#+','') = oc.case_id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
 AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
 AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
 AND oc.owner_assignments = 1
GROUP BY agent_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.AmbiguousColumn) column reference "createddate" is ambiguous
LINE 12: GROUP BY c.id, ownerid_norm, createddate, closeddate
                                      ^

[SQL: SELECT c.id,
       regexp_replace(trim(both from c.ownerid), '^#+','') as ownerid_norm,
       c.createddate::timestamp as createddate,
       c.closeddate::timestamp as closeddate,

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+','') as case_id, COUNT(*) as owner_assignments
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+','')
)
SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from c.ownerid), '^#+','') as agent_id,
       COUNT(*) as cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) as avg_handle_seconds
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN owner_counts oc ON regexp_replace(trim(both from c.id), '^#+','') = oc.case_id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
  AND c.closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
  AND oc.owner_assignments = 1
GROUP BY agent_id
ORDER BY cases_handled DESC, avg_handle_seconds ASC;

args.query:
WITH closed_cases AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from id), '^#+','') AS case_id,
         id as orig_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(both from ownerid), '^#+','') AS ownerid_norm,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::timestamp - createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND closeddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::timestamp
    AND closeddate::timestamp <= '2023-09-02'::timestamp
),
owner_assigns AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(both from caseid__c), '^#+','') AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(trim(both from newvalue__c), '^#+','') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment'
),
owner_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM owner_assigns
  GROUP BY case_id
),
agents_processed AS (
  SELECT oa.agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT oa.case_id) AS processed_cases
  FROM owner_assigns oa
  JOIN closed_cases cc ON cc.case_id = oa.case_id
  GROUP BY oa.agent_id
),
agent_avg_handle AS (
  SELECT cc.ownerid_norm AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS non_transferred_cases,
         AVG(cc.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM closed_cases cc
  JOIN owner_counts oc ON oc.case_id = cc.case_id
  WHERE oc.owner_assignment_count = 1
  GROUP BY cc.ownerid_norm
)
SELECT ap.agent_id
FROM agents_processed ap
JOIN agent_avg_handle ah ON ah.agent_id = ap.agent_id
WHERE ap.processed_cases > 1
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
